ohtani.title: Eric Haase's two-homer game lifts Giants over Dodgers
ohtani.blurb: Eric Haase crushes a pair of homers and Jung Hoo Lee hits a two-run double in the Giants' 6-2 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Cubs use seven-run 4th to win ninth straight game
imanaga.blurb: Cubs score seven runs in the bottom of the 4th to propel them to their ninth straight victory and 15th straight win at home

suzuki.title: Riley, Yastrzemski charge Braves' 5-2 win over Cubs
suzuki.blurb: Austin Riley's game-tying homer in the 5th and Mike Yastrzemski's go-ahead home run set the tone in the Braves' 5-2 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Schwarber homers AGAIN and Wheeler dominates in win
yoshida.blurb: Kyle Schwarber homers in his fifth straight game and Zack Wheeler has an elite outing in the Phillies' 2-1 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Shane McClanahan tosses five scoreless in Rays' win
okamoto.blurb: Shane McClanahan spins five scoreless innings, Taylor Walls hits the go-ahead single in Rays' 7-6 extras win

murakami.title: Derek Hill, Chase Meidroth lead White Sox to 6-5 win
murakami.blurb: Derek Hill crushes a go-ahead solo home run and Chase Meidroth belts a three-run homer leading the White Sox to a 6-5 win over the Royals

matsui.title: Joey Ortiz leads Brewers to fifth straight win
matsui.blurb: Joey Ortiz clubs a home run and Brice Turang caps off a five-run 4th inning with a two-run double to surge the Brewers past the Padres, 6-4
